sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11959" key="a)perktiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπερκτικός</orth>, <sense id="n11959.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀπειρκτικός</ref></xr>, prob.l. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παρεκτικός,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg007:97" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Sens.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">97</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
